programme.desc: Do you know what its like to go to the Boy Scouts and have them ask you where your father is?

programme.title: Sally
programme.desc: These crazy desperate exes appear on the show to try to persuade their partners to come back to the relationship.

programme.title: Sally
programme.desc: Dysfunctional families confront the root of the problem with Sally’s help on today’s heavily dramatic episode.

programme.title: Sally
programme.desc: Couples that have a 30+ year age gap are confronted and questioned about their relationship on today’s Sally.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: A man finds out his wife is having sex with their son-in-law; a man cheats with one of his girlfriend's best friends; a man suspects his girlfriend is cheating with his friend.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Dewight and Tiffany hit their breaking point when she learned he was cheating with her cousin Stacy! Pro cock fighter Johnny slept with Ashly and his girlfriend Ashley is steamed! Warren’s transsexual girlfriend has a big secret!

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: A woman finds romance with her fiancee's twin sister; a man turns to another woman for attention; a man tells the mother of his child that he wants to be with someone else.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Freddie insists he wants to be with his wife and his days of hooking up with his ex-girlfriend are over; Carleeta devises a scheme she thinks will strengthen her bond with her sister; Shi's friend and boyfriend got to know each other better.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Leon has nothing but contempt for his sister's girlfriend, but found himself doing an unthinkable act with her; Brenda fears that a romance with Erika could ruin their friendship; Jenny wants to confess a mistake to her sister.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Three best friends agree to have a threesome; Leo's fiancee confronts her cousin about some explicit photos she sent to him; Brian wants to leave his possessive girlfriend, but she refuses to give up without a fight.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Deja confronts her child's father to find out why she found her friend's number on his call log; Christian wanted to do the right thing after fathering a baby, then hooked up with another woman; Davonta says his ex is crazy, and he wants to be free.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kristin and her special skill set stand in the way of Rikki's trip down the aisle; Eric did something he regrets and asks his wife to forgive him; Danielle fears that her boyfriend cheated with her cousin Qwon.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Last time, Nancy was pregnant with Versell's baby. He was cheating on her with Tara and now she’s pregnant!

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: A couple are here today to confess their infidelity…about the same woman! Next, Joan confronts a dominatrix.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Adrian thinks Shantay has been lying throughout their relationship; Uniqua and her husband fear that he is not the father of her child; Chris' girlfriend wants him to know that one of their five children is not his.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Davonna believes that her husband Michael never abused her son. Her son told his dad Brandon that Michael punched him in the nose and back. Then, Evie wants to prove that she never abused her son and deserves custody of him from her mother!

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Holly says her mother is envious of her and has made up accusations that she has been sleeping with her stepfather; Jovanni reacts to his girlfriend's ironclad proof that he is cheating.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Bobby and Amber are being accused of neglecting and abusing their three children. Then, Kyle believes that his mother-in-law Kristie may be coaching his kids to say that he molested them.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: After 10 years of searching, Brenda will reunite with her kids and address abuse allegations. Then, Cassidy wed Paul 5 days after she split with PJ, but is he molesting her and PJ’s son? Or is PJ the monster who burned their son’s feet?

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Brandon spent time in jail after being accused of sexually abusing his niece. He maintains his innocence and claims that this isn’t the first time his niece has accused someone of molestation! Was she coached by his sister’s boyfriend Billy?

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Amanda is here because she's trying to save her marriage to Bo. Bo's not sure if he's the father of her child and needs a DNA test to prove the truth. Plus, Julie says that she believes she's being cheated on by Stevie.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Latonya says her wife told her she was raped and became pregnant with triplets, but doctors later said she was never pregnant.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Evan says his girlfriend's sister made up the story that they had sex; Sarra's much-older husband accuses her of having sex with her own cousin.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kendra says her boyfriend makes her feel like a prisoner in her own home and accuses her of seducing neighbors through the window; Keisha believes that her husband cheats on her when he is at work.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Gloria thinks her sister's apparent drug-overdose death was not an accident, and that her other sister may be responsible.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sex addict Princess wants to confess to her fiance about her secret double life.

programme.title: Love and Leftovers
programme.desc: Jacob is a successful chef with big dreams of opening his own restaurant, but struggles in his personal life due to his demanding girlfriend, Drina. When Lisa, a strong-willed and grounded woman comes along and sees his potential, Jacob finds himself torn between something familiar, or something new.

programme.title: Stuck on Christmas
programme.desc: Rival colleagues Synclaire and James, vying for a promotion, get stuck in an elevator. Their prank war turns into a desperate struggle for freedom, and to be free for Christmas.

programme.title: An Earl E. Christmas
programme.desc: Earl falls into deep debt after making some bad bets. He decides to fake a terminal illness to get the debt collectors off his tail, only to have his entire family show up at his home for one last special Christmas. But dysfunction and old grudges start to bubble over, making for a chaotic holiday weekend.

programme.title: Christmas Family Ties
programme.desc: Two years after the death of her mother, Amaya pleads to Santa to bring her family together for Christmas like they used to. Her father David, having fallen out with his siblings after his own mother's death, decides to bring her to their ancestral family home for the holiday. Will they survive the holiday with their own family dysfunction and financial ruin hanging over their heads?

programme.title: Christmas for the Soul
programme.desc: Leslie Ross, a spirited activist and soul food cook, reluctantly caters a Christmas Eve dinner for the dysfunctional Shaw family. She expects conflict, but instead finds herself in a holiday storm of secrets, rivalries, and a pie-throwing incident. With her neighborhood facing gentrification, and her father’s restaurant struggling, she makes a deal with the Shaws, while maintaining her true intentions hidden against them.

programme.title: Ebony's Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Ebony Scrooge, a sharp-witted and stubborn winery owner, despises Christmas. Her holiday is abruptly interrupted by three spectral visitors who whisk her away on a transformative journey, forcing her to confront her buried pain and, perhaps, rediscover the true magic of the season.

programme.title: Festive Fling
programme.desc: After Shelly’s painful divorce, she was left feeling like the black sheep of the family. Desperate to move on from the pain of her past, she invites her co-worker Greg to visit her family to pretend to be her boyfriend to deflect her family’s unwanted comments. Little did she know, that her holiday fling, would become a holiday thing.

programme.title: Judge Knott
programme.desc: A father’s horrible mistake causes a lifetime of pain for his children. His son tries his best to live a normal life, but his childhood trauma follows him into his marriage. He must face his trauma head on to break this generational curse.

programme.title: Love and Deceit 2
programme.desc: Carolyn, a successful businesswoman moves to a new town in hopes of laying down some roots after her divorce. She joins a local women’s group ran by Beverly Jordan a respected therapist to help process her emotions. When in reality, she’s there to rekindle an old flame with a former lover, who happens to be Beverly’s husband.

programme.title: The Honeymoon
programme.desc: On her birthday, Summer is publicly humiliated when her fiancé, Chance, and her best friend, Portia, reveal their affair. Seeking revenge, she sabotages their honeymoon with the help of her friend Danisha. A deadly game of cat-and-mouse ensues, with betrayal, violence, and unexpected twists. Ultimately, Summer must confront the consequences of her actions as she fights for her life and seeks justice.

programme.title: Broken Harmony
programme.desc: Recording artist Harmony Brown, listens to every suggestion from her record label including changing her sound, changing her look, and even changing the type of music she sang. Yet, her numbers aren’t improving, and she’s on the verge of being released from her contract. Her manager, suggests she returns to Atlanta and meet with a power house music producer to give her a refresh on her sound. However, she’s forced to stay with and reunite with her mother, and address the trauma of her childhood.

programme.title: Taking What's Mine
programme.desc: Jordan Hayes, a decorated Army veteran turned rising political icon is thrown into a harrowing disaster when her journalist husband, Ethan, is captured by a rising terrorist leader, Khalid Rami. Rami will only release Ethan if Jordan helps overturn a new counter terrorism bill. Refusing to fight the red tape and bow to pressure, Jordan takes matters into her own hands and sets out to rescue him herself.

programme.title: ToxiCity
programme.desc: Corey Spencer, the innovator behind the successful ATLUV dating app, navigates a complex personal life. Despite his app's mission, he struggles with love, further complicated by a child support order. A night out leads him to Sierra, an alluring actress who quickly moves in. Their romance sours as Sierra's past as a dancer and her aggressive jealousy come to light.

programme.title: Shotlanta
programme.desc: Mozzy, driven by a desire to lift his family out of poverty in Jamaica, emigrates to Atlanta. He quickly rises in the ranks of the city's drug trade, determined to achieve wealth and security for his mother and sister. However, his ruthless pursuit of success puts him on a dangerous path, where the line between ambition and destruction blurs.

programme.title: Undercover Consequences
programme.desc: Caught in-between two worlds, Pharaoh has to decide what's more important to him... taking the righteous path...or living the street life. Being loyal to the love of his life, or being loyal to the game.

programme.title: Triangle Slave
programme.desc: Orphaned brothers Keith and Kareem struggle in the world today after loosing their mother was murdered by their father to pay a debt. Through adversary and perseverance, they rose to become two of the biggest drug kingpins in Philadelphia. But when a woman named Sapphire comes between them, will their empire collapse under the weight of their greed and jealousy?

programme.title: Queens of Dope City
programme.desc: Joselyn, Kendra and Alicia are partners in a rideshare service they have created together, but are struggling financially to maintain the business. One day Joselyn gives a man named Donte a ride who presents her with an opportunity to keep the business going. Things then begin to spiral out of control when they soon are chased down from the law, and must escape Donte.

programme.title: Scarred
programme.desc: Nate meets and hooks up with the beautiful Mia after a night out. Everything is beautiful, until Nate’s wife Kamryn discovers his infidelity. The love triangle begins to spiral as everyone is on edge, and that some actions have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Her Last Patient
programme.desc: Dr. Athena Hart thought she had seen every kind of broken soul—until Lucas Morningstar walked into her office. What begins as therapy quickly twists into a deadly game of obsession and revenge.

programme.title: Played in My Face
programme.desc: Tonya’s life is almost picture perfect, and a wedding on the horizon to the man of her dreams, Victor. One night she receives an anonymous email exposing Victor at a hotel on the same night he claimed to be away on business. Her quiet suspicion spirals into obsession as she discovers that Victor’s betrayal runs deeper than she ever imagined.

programme.title: My Plus Size Bachelorette
programme.desc: Symone, a spirited and vibrant plus-size woman in her 30s, finds herself navigating the unpredictable world of modern dating while grappling with the emotional aftermath of her one-night stand with Andre, her high school sweetheart. With her friends rallying around her, they encourage Symone to embrace her single status and embark on a journey of self-discovery and love.

programme.title: False Profits
programme.desc: Delilah is imprisoned for fraud after being apart of her family’s gospel group which was a front for a ponzi scheme. She agrees to be interviewed by a local reporter about her past and her side of the crime. On the day of the interview, her sister performs a song hinting at hidden truths about her past.

programme.title: Don't Miss the Bus
programme.desc: Sierra, a single mother hustles in order to survive with long shifts and grunt work. Her faith is pinned on lottery tickets and men who exploit her vulnerability. When a stroke of luck has the ability to change her future forever, a missed bus stop could mean life or death.

programme.title: We in This Together
programme.desc: Attorney August marries Daisha, a social climber more interested in his bank account than motherhood. To hide her infertility, Daisha secretly adopts 17-year-old "Lil August," sparking an immediate, violent rivalry. While August dismisses the teen’s lethal behavior as "playful," Daisha finds herself trapped in a house with a son who may be a killer. As she plots to conceive a biological heir, a series of dark secrets and "accidents" leave the family’s survival in question.

programme.title: Transcend
programme.desc: Maranda spent her life looking for a protector, only to find herself lost in a cycle of toxic love and betrayal. From the wreckage of abandonment to a life-altering crossroads, her survival isn't just about escaping the past, it’s about surviving herself.

programme.title: The Loyalty Test
programme.desc: Trey Harrison is an up-and-coming internet star that has created a series exposing cheaters in orchestrated sting operations, successfully turning heartbreak into a viral spectacle. But when two participants are found murdered, Trey’s world begins to crumble and things only begin to escalate.

programme.title: Murder on the Pole
programme.desc: One night Bunny was the queen of the dance floor; the next, she was a chalk outline. Dismissed by a department eager to sweep a "club girl's" death under the rug, Lola refuses to let her sister’s killer walk free. To find the murderer, Lola must infiltrate the world that claimed Bunny’s life—a world of predatory regulars, backstage betrayals, and a cover-up that goes higher than she ever imagined.

programme.title: My Man
programme.desc: Trina, a young model, becomes entangled with the charming Max. As their relationship deepens, she uncovers his dark secrets: a double life, a psychotic ex-girlfriend, and a dangerous obsession. When Trina crosses a line, she becomes the target of a deadly game of cat and mouse. Betrayal, madness, and murder ensue as the lines between love, obsession, and survival blur.

programme.title: The Strange Love of Martha Ivers
programme.desc: A man is reunited with his childhood friend and her husband, who believe he knows the truth about the death of her rich aunt years earlier.

programme.title: Night Of The Living Dead
programme.desc: A ragtag group of Pennsylvanians barricade themselves in an old farmhouse to remain safe from a horde of flesh-eating ghouls that are ravaging the East Coast of the United States.

programme.title: Mister Johnson
programme.desc: In 1923, a local resident of British Colonial Nigeria tries to be equal with the colonial administration.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Vamos a adentrarnos en la riquísima historia de una comarca que según se han sucedido los años ha pertenecido a diferentes reinos, que han marcado su economía y forma de vida.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Axarquía, Ronda, Manilva, Sierras de Málaga, posiblemente tienen un solo elemento en común, el cultivo de la uva, pero no se parecen en nada sus paisajes, ni formas de cultivo.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: El nombre de esta Denominación de Origen de Portugal quiere decir literalmente Vino Verde, por que sus uvas eran tradicionalmente vendimiadas verdes, para evitar los riesgos de la podredumbre.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Si duda alguna el vino más prestigioso de Portugal es el Oporto, su nombre deriva de Porto, que en portugués quiere decir Puerto, o mejor dicho El Puerto en donde los vinos son envejecidos y desde donde eran desde antiguo embarcados a todos los rincones del Mundo.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: La Margen Izquierda de Burdeos es la región más influyente del mundo.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Es difícil recorrer una isla de tantas formas como lo hemos hecho: en todo terreno, a pie, en camello, en drones y hasta debajo del agua.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: En este episodio vamos a conocer regiones fronterizas cargadas de historia.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Descubriremos la ruta por la que llegó la vid a California de la mano de misioneros españoles.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: En este primer capítulo de Chile, explicaremos la expansión del cultivo de la uva en el país sudamericano, y su evolución en los últimos años.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Wineman saldrá desde Santiago rumbo a las zonas clásicas del vino chileno.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Desde San Francisco viajaremos a los valles de Napa y Sonoma, los grandes nombres de referencia del vino californiano.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Viajaremos hacia nuevas zonas de cultivo en Chile, al sur de la capital; veremos como en los últimos años se está cultivando en zonas antes inimaginables.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Descubriremos cómo, tras la célebre "cata de París", en la que compitieron los mejores vinos de Francia contra los mejores de california, se produjo la gran eclosión de sus vinos.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: En una feria de vinos tuvimos la oportunidad de probar una botella de vino ¡con un genio dentro!

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Hay un claro motivo de por qué La Rioja ha ido siempre varios pasos por delante del resto.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: El gusto del vino no puede, o mejor dicho, no debe de estar reñido con el gusto del consumidor.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: ¿Dónde empieza y donde acaba una denominación de origen?

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Determinados estilos de vinos sólo se puedan elaborar en contados años, en los que se producen aparentes adversidades.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Desde los alcornocales, en el suroeste de Portugal, viajaremos hasta el norte, para descubrir cómo se convierten las cortezas de estos árboles en tapones.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Marmajuelo, Gual, Vijariego, Baboso Negro, Verdello, Listán negro, Negramoll, son algunos nombres de variedades autóctonas que fueron responsables de algunos de los vinos más preciados del mundo.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Hay testimonios de la presencia de la uva en Jumilla de hace 5.000 años.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Durante un año completo seremos testigos del ciclo de una vieja viña de Monastrell, sobre un suelo pobre y bajo un sol de justicia.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: En este episodio vamos a visitar la mayor cooperativa de Cariñena, que es además el resultado de la unión de un grupo de cooperativas.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: No sabemos qué beberían los pobladores del Monte Arabí, pero si los Romanos, que aquí dejaron profunda huella.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Tanto Tannat por domesticar Visitaremos Uruguay y recorreremos algunos de sus mejores viñedos y nos quedaremos impresionados de ver su evolución en el transcurso de tan pocos años.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Vinos recuperados para entrar en la eternidad Los vinos de Fondillón los bebía el mismísimo Luis XIV, el Rey Sol.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: La riqueza genética de las Garnachas. Ya por fin la Garnacha ha dejado de ser el patito feo de la uvas.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in beautiful Norway for the kick off of the 2017 MLO Strongman Champions League season. With partly cloudy weather and lots of snow, we have the perfect scenery for the athletes, who prepare for the first contest of the year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: A definite highlight in this FIBO edition in Germany, Strongman Champions League introduced its new rules for a special team item. Graham Hicks tries here to set a New World Record on the biggest log in the world, currently held by Krzysztof Radzikowski. Boosted also by the presence of the acclaimed in the strongman circles names of Mark Felix and Danis Zageris.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This weekend sees the Strongman Champions League Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. Big lifting names such as Graham Hicks , Vidas Blekaitis and Vytatus Lalas are in the startlist to push some big numbers.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The battle of the Dutch will take place this edition in Lichtenvoorde, a place very well known in Holland because of the famous “Black Cross”. The athletes will compete over six heavy events and the winner gets 25 Strongman Champions League ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Set in the beautiful mountain resort Zlatibor, the fifth stage of the Strongman Champions League 2017 sees 14 athletes from across the world competing for the gold medal of SCL Serbia 2017. The event welcomes top-athlete - and odds-on favourite - Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia), who has presented himself in an impressive shape so far. Can his opponents defeat him?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next two stages take place in Quebec. With eight events over two days, SCL Canada is a true ‘heavyweight’. The athletes compete in: Truck Pull, Deadlift with cars, Log Lift, and the Atlas Stones. The World’s Strongest Viking Jean-Francois Caron from Canada is a favourite, as well as current SCL leader Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and promising underdog Jimmy Paquet (Canada).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to the second day in Quebec. The athletes are fighting hard to win this two-day event. The last points of this SCL stage can be won over four outstanding disciplines: Power Stairs, Dumbbell Press, Keg Toss, and finally, the legendary Farmer’s Walk. Who will leave Canada with the yellow ‘Leader Shirt’?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven’t given up yet.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This under 105kg category event is the ultimate preparation for up-and-coming strongman athletes before entering the heavy class. The Lightweight World Championship is a special every year in the SCL calendar as it sees new talents rise and many promising athletes who are gearing up for future tournaments. A total of 25 athletes from 16 different countries make their way to Kokkola, Finland

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Situated in the very heart of the Carpathian Mountains, Sibiu is a Romanian town where the climate is pleasantly mild, offering some of the best weather conditions for a strongman event around Europe. All this, without doubt, set the mood for the high results and showtime vibes in Stage 11 of Strongman Champions League. The competition in Sibiu was organized in six different disciplines

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let’s see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Ten of the world’s strongest men gathered in Amman to compete in Jordan’s first-ever Truck-Pull Championship. The contestants race against the clock while pulling a 21-ton truck across the track. One of the most fierce competitors to take part in the event was four-time winner of the World’s Strongest Man competition, Brian Shaw.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Taking place in Corinth, Greece, considered by many the cradle of the sports competition games, an epic strongman battle will mark the last stage before the upcoming big two-day season’s finale in Chetumal, Mexico. In front of more than 5000 spectators, the twelve athletes compete in Log Lifts, Card Deadlift, Conan’s Wheel and Loading.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The first day of the two-part finale sees the strongest men competing in Carry and Drag, Dumbbell Lift and the Truck Pull. Everything is possible in this heated fight for the crown against the backdrop of stunning Chetumal, Mexico.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: On the second day of the grand finale of the 2017 Strongman Champions League, the athletes have a last chance to secure the medals in the spectacular four events Weight for Height, Deadlift Cars, Forward Hold and The Loading Medley. Be prepared for stunning performances – and even world records!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. We’ll see typical Viking disciplines, team events and world records in heavy conditions in the land of snow and ice. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capichampions league on the planet. It’s a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2018 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: For the first time in history, Strongman Champions League will set up competition in Abu Dhabi. The line-up of super athletes, who are part of the SCL, includes former world champions Dainis Zageris (Latvia) & Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland), current world champion Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and biggest strongman in the World Sean O’Hagan (Ireland).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Strongman classic in land where there is no place for anything else excepts strength, fight and endurance. Here are fourteen of the strongest men, fighting for the title of strongest in Holland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We go back to Holland, where former champion Dainis Zageris is in leading position after the first three events. Alongside Radzikowski, he is in this moment favorite for world title, and also leader shirt holder.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stage six of Strongman champions league, 2018 is set back on north, in Finland. Here we have Matjaz Belsak, wearing SCL leader shirt, one of the biggest strongman in the World Mika Torro, fan favorite strongman in all over the World – Will Baggott, and also big name from Baltic – Aivars Smaukstelis

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Twelve strongman, including defending Worldchampion Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia , will compete on “Air spa” for the title of best in homeland country of Tesla, Pupin, Novak Djokovic. Matjaz Belsak is the SCL leader in this competition, chasing his third victory this season.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The World championship in lightweights of the Strongman Champions League bring to us 50 strongmen from all over the world. All athletes are under 105 kilograms and for them this is the step up to the ultimate heavyweights.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this second stage of the World championship of lightweights we will find out who out of the 12 athletes will win the title in the under 105 kilogram category.

programme.title: 37th World Championship Nat. Teams 3-Cushion
programme.desc: Final match of the 37th UMB World Championship National Teams 2025, held in Viersen, Germany. Quyet Chien Tran (VIE) faces Dick Jaspers (NED) in the decisive championship final.
